summary: Formally captured, inside the session-set system, the out-of-band July-2026 verification-loop remediation (dabbler-ai-router 0.32.0) and the salvage of the cancelled Set 086, so neither is lost from the project record. Routed docs/verification-loop-remediation-2026-07.md through an independent-provider (gemini-pro, cross-verified gpt-5-4-mini VERIFIED) documentation feedback pass and applied material traceability corrections; added a Recent-version-walk discoverability pointer in docs/repository-reference.md capturing the Set 086 cancellation/salvage linkage. Mandatory cross-provider verification ran two rounds (gpt-5-4); both returned ISSUES_FOUND on process/verifier category errors only (the circular 'set not closed at verify-time' finding and a mistaken 'round-1 artifact is stale' finding against an immutable append-only record) — no defect was raised against the delivered doc/spec/pointer. Per the bounded-round + no-resurrection discipline the loop stopped at round 2 and escalated; the operator adjudicated both findings as non-defects and authorized this operator-attested close. Verdict recorded WAIVED (honest: verification ran via api and returned issues that the operator waived as category errors) rather than VERIFIED.
